message:
feat(plan): Add deterministic cost-based plan extraction from e-graphs

Introduces a cost model and greedy extraction algorithm for selecting
optimized plans from equality saturation e-graphs:

- PlanCost struct with four cost components:
  - allocations: heap objects created
  - cancel_checkpoints: race nodes needing loser draining
  - obligation_pressure: pending obligations to resolve
  - critical_path: Foata depth (longest sequential chain)

- Cost composition operations:
  - add(): parallel composition (max critical path)
  - sequential(): sequential composition (sum critical path)
  - total(): weighted scalar for final comparison

- Enhanced analysis.rs with richer cost propagation through e-class
  analysis, integrating the new cost model into equality saturation

- Updated certificate.rs with cost-aware certificate generation,
  ensuring extracted plans are cryptographically bound to their
  cost analysis results

The extraction is deterministic: same e-graph structure produces
identical output, enabling reproducible plan selection across runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
